title: We built a persistent agent memory layer on Elasticsearch with 0.89 recall
abstract: We built a persistent agent memory layer on Elasticsearch with 0.89 recall is an AI agent framework that autonomously plans tasks, calls tools, and executes multi-step workflows. Set the goal, and it ...
abstract_zh: 伙计们！我最近发现了一个神器——**We built a persistent agent memory layer on Elasticsearch with 0.89 recall**。你还在为写周报时翻遍资料、调Bug时抓狂吗？别急，这个工具能帮你一次性解决！它能精准地从海量数据中找到你需要的信息，召回率高达惊人的89%！就像有了私人助理一样高效便捷，再也不用担心信息遗漏啦！
